from __future__ import annotations

import copy
import importlib.util
import inspect
import json
import os
import shutil
import subprocess
import sys
import tempfile
import unittest
from pathlib import Path
from unittest import mock

ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]
MODULE_PATH = ROOT / "tools/designflow_platform.py"
SPEC = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("designflow_platform", MODULE_PATH)
assert SPEC and SPEC.loader
platform = importlib.util.module_from_spec(SPEC)
sys.modules[SPEC.name] = platform
SPEC.loader.exec_module(platform)


class CanonicalContractTests(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_canonical_schema_and_four_profile_extensions_exist(self) -> None:
        paths = [
            ROOT / "spec/design-ir/canonical-design-ir.schema.json",
            ROOT / "spec/design-ir/profiles/backend.schema.json",
            ROOT / "spec/design-ir/profiles/frontend.schema.json",
            ROOT / "spec/design-ir/profiles/infrastructure.schema.json",
            ROOT / "spec/design-ir/profiles/batch.schema.json",
            ROOT / "spec/design-ir/adapter-protocol.schema.json",
            ROOT / "spec/design-ir/adapter-manifest.schema.json",
            ROOT / "spec/design-ir/support-registry.schema.json",
            ROOT / "spec/design-ir/designflow-config.schema.json",
            ROOT / "spec/design-ir/bundle-manifest.schema.json",
        ]
        for path in paths:
            with self.subTest(path=path):
                document = json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
                self.assertIn("$id", document)
                self.assertIn("$schema", document)
        self.assertEqual(
            json.loads(paths[0].read_text(encoding="utf-8"))["properties"]["schema_version"]["const"],
            platform.IR_SCHEMA_VERSION,
        )

    def test_schema_contract_sample_validates_in_runtime(self) -> None:
        sample = {
            "schema_version": platform.IR_SCHEMA_VERSION,
            "project_id": "sample",
            "profile_ids": ["backend"],
            "facts": [],
            "relations": [],
            "identity_migrations": [],
            "capability_results": [],
            "diagnostics": [],
            "metadata": {
                "generator": {},
                "adapters": [],
                "inputs": [],
                "authority_decisions": [],
                "normalized_environment": platform.normalized_environment(),
            },
        }
        platform.validate_ir(sample)
        invalid = copy.deepcopy(sample)
        invalid["schema_version"] = "design-ir/v999"
        with self.assertRaises(platform.ContractError):
            platform.validate_ir(invalid)

    def test_adapter_manifests_and_registry_are_contract_valid(self) -> None:
        manifests = list((ROOT / "spec/design-ir/adapters").glob("*/adapter-manifest.json"))
        self.assertGreaterEqual(len(manifests), 10)
        for path in manifests:
            with self.subTest(path=path):
                platform.validate_adapter_manifest(json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8")))
        registry = json.loads(
            (ROOT / "governance/design-adapters/support-registry.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
        )
        platform.validate_support_registry(registry)
        lifecycles = {entry["support_lifecycle"] for entry in registry["entries"]}
        self.assertTrue(lifecycles <= platform.LIFECYCLES)
        for entry in registry["entries"]:
            self.assertIn("extraction_status", entry)
            self.assertNotEqual(entry["support_lifecycle"], entry["extraction_status"])

    def test_positive_fixture_alone_cannot_promote_support(self) -> None:
        registry = {
            "schema_version": platform.SUPPORT_REGISTRY_VERSION,
            "entries": [
                {
                    "adapter_id": "fake",
                    "capability_id": "backend.routes",
                    "support_lifecycle": "supported",
                    "extraction_status": "exact",
                    "conformance_evidence": {
                        "layers": [1, 2],
                        "real_toolchain": False,
                        "workflow": ".github/workflows/designflow-conformance.yml",
                        "scope": "positive fixture only",
                    },
                }
            ],
        }
        with self.assertRaises(platform.ContractError):
            platform.validate_support_registry(registry)

    def test_canonical_serialization_and_ids_are_stable(self) -> None:
        left = {"z": [3, 2], "a": {"y": 2, "x": 1}}
        right = {"a": {"x": 1, "y": 2}, "z": [3, 2]}
        self.assertEqual(platform.canonical_json_bytes(left), platform.canonical_json_bytes(right))
        self.assertEqual(
            platform.stable_id("fact", "project", "backend.operation", "listOrders"),
            platform.stable_id("fact", "project", "backend.operation", "listOrders"),
        )

    def test_profile_namespace_is_enforced(self) -> None:
        ir = {
            "schema_version": platform.IR_SCHEMA_VERSION,
            "project_id": "bad",
            "profile_ids": ["backend"],
            "facts": [
                {
                    "fact_id": "fact:x",
                    "fact_type": "node",
                    "kind": "frontend.route",
                    "natural_key": "x",
                    "capability_id": "frontend.routes",
                    "value": {},
                    "evidence": [],
                    "requirement_refs": [],
                    "test_refs": [],
                    "external_evidence_refs": [],
                }
            ],
            "relations": [],
            "identity_migrations": [],
            "capability_results": [],
            "diagnostics": [],
        }
        with self.assertRaises(platform.ContractError):
            platform.validate_ir(ir)


class AdapterAndConformanceTests(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_nine_layer_conformance_passes(self) -> None:
        report = platform.run_conformance(ROOT, real_toolchain=False)
        self.assertEqual(report["status"], "pass")
        self.assertEqual([layer["layer"] for layer in report["layers"]], list(range(1, 10)))
        self.assertGreaterEqual(report["metrics"]["positive_cases"], 5)
        self.assertGreaterEqual(report["metrics"]["negative_cases"], 5)
        self.assertEqual(report["layers"][8]["status"], "external-evidence-required")

    def test_real_toolchain_fastapi_generates_openapi(self) -> None:
        try:
            import fastapi  # noqa: F401
        except ImportError:
            self.skipTest("FastAPI is installed in the real-toolchain CI job")
        result = platform._real_toolchain_conformance(ROOT)
        self.assertEqual(result["status"], "pass")
        self.assertIn("framework_version", result)

    def test_five_framework_positive_projection_is_equivalent(self) -> None:
        projections = []
        for case_path in sorted((ROOT / "tests/fixtures/designflow/conformance/backend").glob("*-positive/case.json")):
            case = json.loads(case_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
            context = platform.AdapterContext(
                root=case_path.parent,
                project_id=case["id"],
                profile_ids=("backend",),
                adapter_config={"id": case["adapter"], "inputs": case["inputs"], "required": True},
                normalized_environment=platform.normalized_environment(),
            )
            fragment = platform.AdapterRunner().run_builtin(case["adapter"], context)
            ir = platform.merge_fragments(case["id"], ["backend"], [fragment])
            projections.append(platform._semantic_projection(ir))
        self.assertEqual(len(projections), 5)
        semantic_values = [
            [{"kind": item["kind"], "value": item["value"]} for item in projection]
            for projection in projections
        ]
        self.assertTrue(all(value == semantic_values[0] for value in semantic_values[1:]))

    def test_dynamic_negative_corpus_fails_closed(self) -> None:
        cases = list((ROOT / "tests/fixtures/designflow/conformance/backend").glob("*-negative/case.json"))
        self.assertGreaterEqual(len(cases), 5)
        for case_path in cases:
            case = json.loads(case_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
            context = platform.AdapterContext(
                root=case_path.parent,
                project_id=case["id"],
                profile_ids=("backend",),
                adapter_config={"id": case["adapter"], "inputs": case["inputs"], "required": True},
                normalized_environment=platform.normalized_environment(),
            )
            fragment = platform.AdapterRunner().run_builtin(case["adapter"], context)
            ir = platform.merge_fragments(case["id"], ["backend"], [fragment])
            with self.subTest(case=case["id"]):
                self.assertIn(case["expected_diagnostic"], {item["code"] for item in ir["diagnostics"]})
                self.assertTrue(platform.required_capability_failures(ir))

    def test_framework_specific_logic_stays_in_adapter_classes(self) -> None:
        core_source = inspect.getsource(platform.merge_fragments) + inspect.getsource(platform.build_project_bundle)
        for framework in ("fastapi", "spring", "rails", "nestjs", "gin"):
            self.assertNotIn(framework, core_source.lower())

    def test_sandbox_security_corpus_rejects_all_cases(self) -> None:
        results = platform._run_security_conformance(ROOT / "tests/fixtures/designflow/security")
        self.assertEqual({item["id"] for item in results}, {
            "path-escape",
            "timeout",
            "resource",
            "secret-log",
            "secret-fragment",
        })

    def test_process_runner_scrubs_ambient_credentials(self) -> None:
        fixture = ROOT / "tests/fixtures/designflow/security/environment"
        config = json.loads((fixture / "case.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        context = platform.AdapterContext(
            root=fixture,
            project_id="environment",
            profile_ids=("backend",),
            adapter_config=config["adapter"],
            normalized_environment=platform.normalized_environment(),
        )
        with mock.patch.dict(os.environ, {"AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY": "must-not-enter-sandbox"}, clear=False):
            fragment = platform.AdapterRunner().run_process(fixture / "adapter-manifest.json", context)
        self.assertFalse(fragment.diagnostics)
        self.assertEqual(fragment.facts[0]["value"]["ambient_secret_present"], False)


class PhaseOneVerticalSliceTests(unittest.TestCase):
    def setUp(self) -> None:
        self.temp = tempfile.TemporaryDirectory()
        self.root = Path(self.temp.name) / "phase1"
        shutil.copytree(ROOT / "tests/fixtures/designflow/phase1", self.root)

    def tearDown(self) -> None:
        self.temp.cleanup()

    def _config(self) -> dict:
        config = platform.load_config(self.root / "designflow.yaml")
        config["config_path"] = "designflow.yaml"
        return config

    def test_fastapi_openapi_and_sql_are_merged_into_one_ir(self) -> None:
        result = platform.build_project_bundle(self.root, self._config(), "orders-backend")
        kinds = {fact["kind"] for fact in result.ir["facts"]}
        self.assertIn("backend.operation", kinds)
        self.assertIn("backend.table", kinds)
        self.assertIn("backend.query", kinds)
        operation = next(fact for fact in result.ir["facts"] if fact["kind"] == "backend.operation")
        self.assertGreaterEqual(len(operation["evidence"]), 2)
        self.assertIn("requirement_refs", operation)
        self.assertIn("test_refs", operation)
        self.assertIn("external_evidence_refs", operation)

    def test_markdown_reads_ir_only_and_mermaid_reads_graph_only(self) -> None:
        self.assertEqual(list(inspect.signature(platform.render_project_files).parameters), ["ir"])
        self.assertEqual(list(inspect.signature(platform.render_graph_mmd).parameters), ["graph"])
        ir = platform._run_project_ir(self.root, platform._find_project(self._config(), "orders-backend"))
        graph = platform.project_graph(ir)
        with mock.patch.object(Path, "read_text", side_effect=AssertionError("renderer side channel")):
            files = platform.render_project_files(ir)
            mermaid = platform.render_graph_mmd(graph)
        self.assertIn("TRACEABILITY.gen.md", files)
        self.assertTrue(mermaid.startswith("graph TD"))

    def test_project_bundle_contract_and_compatibility_views(self) -> None:
        result = platform.build_project_bundle(self.root, self._config(), "orders-backend")
        expected = {
            "manifest.json",
            "design.ir.json",
            "design.graph.json",
            "design.graph.mmd",
            "TRACEABILITY.gen.md",
            "API_CATALOG.gen.md",
            "INTERFACES.gen.md",
            "OPERATIONS.gen.md",
            "SEQUENCES.gen.md",
            "DATA_MODEL.gen.md",
            "CRUD.gen.md",
            "QUERY_OBJECTS.gen.md",
        }
        self.assertTrue(expected <= set(result.files))
        self.assertNotIn("DIAGNOSTICS.gen.md", result.files)
        manifest = json.loads(result.files["manifest.json"])
        self.assertEqual(manifest["schema_version"], platform.BUNDLE_VERSION)
        self.assertEqual({item["path"] for item in manifest["files"]}, set(result.files) - {"manifest.json"})

    def test_generation_is_byte_deterministic_across_environment(self) -> None:
        first = platform.build_project_bundle(self.root, self._config(), "orders-backend")
        first_bytes = dict(first.files)
        shutil.rmtree(first.output_dir)
        with mock.patch.dict(os.environ, {"TZ": "Asia/Tokyo", "LANG": "ja_JP.UTF-8"}, clear=False):
            second = platform.build_project_bundle(self.root, self._config(), "orders-backend")
        self.assertEqual(first_bytes, second.files)

    def test_check_detects_semantic_and_byte_drift_without_overwrite(self) -> None:
        result = platform.build_project_bundle(self.root, self._config(), "orders-backend")
        target = result.output_dir / "API_CATALOG.gen.md"
        target.write_text(target.read_text(encoding="utf-8") + "drift\n", encoding="utf-8")
        before = target.read_bytes()
        with self.assertRaises(platform.DriftDetected) as raised:
            platform.build_project_bundle(self.root, self._config(), "orders-backend", check=True)
        self.assertIn("API_CATALOG.gen.md", {item["path"] for item in raised.exception.details["changes"]})
        self.assertEqual(before, target.read_bytes())

    def test_required_unknown_fails_closed_and_emits_diagnostics(self) -> None:
        app = self.root / "app.py"
        app.write_text(
            "from fastapi import FastAPI\napp=FastAPI()\npath='/orders'\n@app.get(path)\ndef listOrders(): return []\n",
            encoding="utf-8",
        )
        config = self._config()
        project = platform._find_project(config, "orders-backend")
        project["adapters"] = [project["adapters"][0]]
        ir = platform._run_project_ir(self.root, project)
        self.assertTrue(platform.required_capability_failures(ir))
        self.assertIn("ROUTE_DYNAMIC_UNRESOLVED", {item["code"] for item in ir["diagnostics"]})

    def test_equal_authority_conflict_is_retained_not_guessed(self) -> None:
        fixture = ROOT / "tests/fixtures/designflow/conformance/conflict"
        config = platform.load_config(fixture / "designflow.yaml")
        ir = platform._run_project_ir(fixture, platform._find_project(config, "conflict"))
        self.assertIn("AUTHORITY_CONFLICT", {item["code"] for item in ir["diagnostics"]})
        self.assertTrue(any(item["status"] == "conflict" for item in ir["capability_results"]))

    def test_explain_returns_provenance_and_authority_decisions(self) -> None:
        ir = platform._run_project_ir(self.root, platform._find_project(self._config(), "orders-backend"))
        fact = next(item for item in ir["facts"] if item["kind"] == "backend.operation")
        explanation = platform.explain(ir, fact["fact_id"])
        self.assertEqual(explanation["facts"][0]["fact_id"], fact["fact_id"])
        self.assertGreaterEqual(len(explanation["facts"][0]["evidence"]), 2)


class MigrationAndIdentityTests(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_generate_refuses_legacy_bundle_until_explicit_migration(self) -> None:
        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as temporary:
            root = Path(temporary)
            shutil.copytree(ROOT / "tests/fixtures/designflow/phase1", root / "fixture")
            fixture = root / "fixture"
            output = fixture / "docs/design/generated/orders-backend"
            output.mkdir(parents=True)
            (output / "manifest.json").write_text('{"schema_version":"legacy/v1"}\n', encoding="utf-8")
            (output / "API_CATALOG.gen.md").write_text("legacy\n", encoding="utf-8")
            config = platform.load_config(fixture / "designflow.yaml")
            config["config_path"] = "designflow.yaml"
            with self.assertRaises(platform.MigrationRequired):
                platform.build_project_bundle(fixture, config, "orders-backend")
            check = platform.migrate_bundle(fixture, output, apply=False)
            self.assertEqual(check["status"], "required")
            self.assertEqual(check["compatibility_mapping"]["API_CATALOG.gen.md"], "API_CATALOG.gen.md")
            self.assertEqual((output / "manifest.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8").strip(), '{"schema_version":"legacy/v1"}')
            applied = platform.migrate_bundle(fixture, output, apply=True)
            self.assertEqual(applied["status"], "applied")
            self.assertTrue((output / "design.ir.json").exists())
            self.assertEqual((output / "API_CATALOG.gen.md").read_text(encoding="utf-8"), "legacy\n")

    def test_rename_with_traces_requires_explicit_identity_migration(self) -> None:
        old_fact = {
            "fact_id": "fact:old",
            "fact_type": "node",
            "kind": "backend.operation",
            "natural_key": "old",
            "capability_id": "backend.routes",
            "value": {},
            "evidence": [],
            "requirement_refs": ["REQ-ASBUILT-001"],
            "test_refs": ["test-old"],
            "external_evidence_refs": [],
        }
        previous = {"facts": [old_fact]}
        current = {"facts": [], "identity_migrations": []}
        diagnostics = platform._orphan_trace_diagnostics(previous, current)
        self.assertEqual(diagnostics[0]["code"], "ORPHAN_TRACE_AFTER_RENAME")
        current["identity_migrations"] = [
            {
                "old_fact_id": "fact:old",
                "new_fact_id": "fact:new",
                "reason": "handler rename",
                "evidence": [{"path": "app.py", "line": 1}],
            }
        ]
        self.assertFalse(platform._orphan_trace_diagnostics(previous, current))

    def test_identity_migration_requires_reason_and_evidence(self) -> None:
        ir = {
            "schema_version": platform.IR_SCHEMA_VERSION,
            "project_id": "x",
            "profile_ids": ["backend"],
            "facts": [],
            "relations": [],
            "identity_migrations": [{"old_fact_id": "a", "new_fact_id": "b"}],
            "capability_results": [],
            "diagnostics": [],
        }
        with self.assertRaises(platform.ContractError):
            platform.validate_ir(ir)


class FourProfileAndSystemTests(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_frontend_profile_views_have_evidence_and_verification(self) -> None:
        fixture = ROOT / "tests/fixtures/designflow/profiles/frontend"
        config = platform.load_config(fixture / "designflow.yaml")
        config["config_path"] = "designflow.yaml"
        result = platform.build_project_bundle(fixture, config, "web")
        self.assertIn("IMPLEMENTATION.gen.md", result.files)
        self.assertIn("VERIFICATION_MAP.gen.md", result.files)
        self.assertTrue(any(fact["test_refs"] for fact in result.ir["facts"]))

    def test_infrastructure_profile_views_use_synthesized_artifact(self) -> None:
        fixture = ROOT / "tests/fixtures/designflow/profiles/infrastructure"
        config = platform.load_config(fixture / "designflow.yaml")
        config["config_path"] = "designflow.yaml"
        result = platform.build_project_bundle(fixture, config, "infra")
        self.assertIn("RESOURCES.gen.md", result.files)
        self.assertIn("PARAMETERS.gen.md", result.files)
        self.assertIn("DEPENDENCIES.gen.md", result.files)
        self.assertFalse(platform.secret_findings(result.ir))
        secret_fact = next(fact for fact in result.ir["facts"] if fact["kind"] == "infra.parameter" and fact["value"]["no_echo"])
        self.assertIn("secret_reference", secret_fact["value"])
        self.assertNotIn("default", secret_fact["value"])

    def test_batch_profile_views_include_flow_effect_recovery_and_tests(self) -> None:
        fixture = ROOT / "tests/fixtures/designflow/profiles/batch"
        config = platform.load_config(fixture / "designflow.yaml")
        config["config_path"] = "designflow.yaml"
        result = platform.build_project_bundle(fixture, config, "nightly")
        expected = {"BATCH_CATALOG.gen.md", "JOBS.gen.md", "FLOWS.gen.md", "EFFECTS.gen.md", "RECOVERY.gen.md", "VERIFICATION_MAP.gen.md"}
        self.assertTrue(expected <= set(result.files))

    def test_system_fixture_merges_two_projects_and_two_profiles(self) -> None:
        fixture = ROOT / "tests/fixtures/designflow/system"
        config_path = fixture / "designflow.yaml"
        results = platform.generate_all(fixture, config_path)
        system = next(result for result in results if result.project_id == "system")
        self.assertGreaterEqual(len({fact["kind"].split(".", 1)[0] for fact in system.ir["facts"]}), 2)
        self.assertTrue(any(relation["kind"] == "system.calls" for relation in system.ir["relations"]))
        self.assertFalse(platform.required_capability_failures(system.ir))
        self.assertIn("SYSTEM_OVERVIEW.gen.md", system.files)
        self.assertIn("SYSTEM_GRAPH.gen.md", system.files)

    def test_system_orphan_and_conflict_are_explicit(self) -> None:
        fixture = ROOT / "tests/fixtures/designflow/system"
        config = platform.load_config(fixture / "designflow.yaml")
        config["system_links"].append(
            {
                "id": "missing",
                "kind": "system.calls",
                "from": {"project": "web", "kind": "frontend.route", "natural_key": "missing"},
                "to": {"project": "api", "kind": "backend.operation", "natural_key": "listOrders"},
            }
        )
        config["config_path"] = "designflow.yaml"
        project_results = [
            platform.build_project_bundle(fixture, config, project["id"], output_override=Path(tempfile.mkdtemp()) / project["id"])
            for project in config["projects"]
        ]
        output = Path(tempfile.mkdtemp()) / "system"
        config["system_output"] = output.as_posix()
        result = platform.build_system_bundle(fixture, config, project_results)
        self.assertIsNotNone(result)
        assert result is not None
        self.assertIn("SYSTEM_LINK_ORPHAN", {item["code"] for item in result.ir["diagnostics"]})
        self.assertTrue(platform.required_capability_failures(result.ir))


class DeliveryAndGovernanceTests(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_all_canonical_cli_commands_are_exposed(self) -> None:
        help_result = subprocess.run(
            [sys.executable, str(ROOT / ".agents/skills/generate-implementation-design/scripts/designflow.py"), "--help"],
            cwd=ROOT,
            text=True,
            stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
            check=True,
        )
        for command in ("discover", "generate", "check", "explain", "describe-capabilities", "conformance", "migrate"):
            self.assertIn(command, help_result.stdout)

    def test_legacy_wrapper_is_preserved(self) -> None:
        self.assertTrue((ROOT / ".agents/skills/generate-implementation-design/scripts/designflow_legacy.py").exists())
        wrapper = (ROOT / ".agents/skills/generate-implementation-design/scripts/designflow.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
        self.assertIn("designflow_legacy.py", wrapper)
        self.assertIn("validate-adapter", wrapper)

    def test_project_local_adapter_template_is_complete(self) -> None:
        template = ROOT / ".agents/skills/generate-implementation-design/templates/project-local-adapter"
        expected = {
            "README.md",
            "adapter-manifest.json",
            "adapter.py",
            "fixtures/positive/request.json",
            "fixtures/negative/request.json",
        }
        actual = {path.relative_to(template).as_posix() for path in template.rglob("*") if path.is_file()}
        self.assertTrue(expected <= actual)
        platform.validate_adapter_manifest(json.loads((template / "adapter-manifest.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")))
        self.assertEqual(
            json.loads((template / "adapter-manifest.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))["support_lifecycle"],
            "candidate",
        )

    def test_adoption_dry_run_apply_and_no_overwrite(self) -> None:
        with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as temporary:
            consumer = Path(temporary) / "consumer"
            consumer.mkdir()
            (consumer / "AGENTS.md").write_text("keep agents\n", encoding="utf-8")
            workflow = consumer / ".github/workflows/ci.yml"
            workflow.parent.mkdir(parents=True)
            workflow.write_text("name: keep\n", encoding="utf-8")
            command = [
                sys.executable,
                str(ROOT / "tools/adopt_implementation_design.py"),
                "--source-root",
                str(ROOT),
                "--target",
                str(consumer),
                "--profile",
                "backend",
            ]
            dry = subprocess.run([*command, "--dry-run"], text=True, stdout=subprocess.PIPE, check=True)
            self.assertIn("designflow.yaml", dry.stdout)
            self.assertFalse((consumer / "designflow.yaml").exists())
            subprocess.run([*command, "--apply"], check=True)
            self.assertTrue((consumer / "designflow.yaml").exists())
            self.assertEqual((consumer / "AGENTS.md").read_text(encoding="utf-8"), "keep agents\n")
            self.assertEqual(workflow.read_text(encoding="utf-8"), "name: keep\n")
            second = subprocess.run([*command, "--apply"], text=True, stderr=subprocess.PIPE)
            self.assertNotEqual(second.returncode, 0)
            self.assertIn("refuses to overwrite", second.stderr)

    def test_distribution_contains_adoption_and_four_profile_entries(self) -> None:
        manifest = json.loads((ROOT / "distribution/designflow/manifest.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        self.assertIn(".agents/skills/adopt-implementation-design/SKILL.md", manifest["skills"])
        self.assertEqual(set(manifest["profiles"]), {"backend", "frontend", "infrastructure", "batch"})
        for profile in manifest["profiles"]:
            self.assertTrue((ROOT / f".agents/skills/adopt-implementation-design/references/{profile}.md").exists())

    def test_requirement_binding_ids_exist_in_canonical_requirements(self) -> None:
        requirements = json.loads((ROOT / "spec/requirements/requirements.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        canonical_ids = set(_all_requirement_ids(requirements))
        bindings = json.loads((ROOT / "spec/design-ir/requirement-bindings.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        bound_ids = {item for binding in bindings["bindings"] for item in binding["requirement_ids"]}
        self.assertTrue(bound_ids)
        self.assertTrue(bound_ids <= canonical_ids)

    def test_traceability_contract_reuses_no_check_id(self) -> None:
        trace = json.loads((ROOT / "spec/design-ir/traceability.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
        check_ids = [check for item in trace["acceptance_criteria"] for check in item["check_ids"]]
        self.assertTrue(all(check.startswith("FAST-") for check in check_ids))
        catalog_text = (ROOT / "governance/checks/catalog.yaml").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
        for check_id in set(check_ids):
            self.assertEqual(catalog_text.count(f"id: {check_id}"), 1)

    def test_issue_22_boundary_uses_shared_conformance_api(self) -> None:
        document = (ROOT / "docs/reference/designflow-conformance-api.md").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
        self.assertIn("run_conformance", document)
        self.assertIn("E2E harness", document)
        self.assertIn("agent interaction", document)

    def test_phase_one_exit_decision_record_contains_measured_metrics(self) -> None:
        record = (ROOT / "docs/decisions/DR-20260724-designflow-phase1-exit.md").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
        self.assertIn("positive_cases", record)
        self.assertIn("negative_cases", record)
        self.assertIn("PASS", record)
        self.assertIn("Phase 2", record)


def _all_requirement_ids(value):
    if isinstance(value, dict):
        for key, item in value.items():
            if key in {"id", "requirement_id"} and isinstance(item, str) and item.startswith("REQ-"):
                yield item
            yield from _all_requirement_ids(item)
    elif isinstance(value, list):
        for item in value:
            yield from _all_requirement_ids(item)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    unittest.main()
